name: Vannessa | An Unwanted Heat.
description:
"Ughhh... I'm so pent up...~"

-

One of the popular girls on campus, Vannessa, has a problem... Seems her Libido has skyrocketed. Shenanigans Ensue?

(Art by Cinnabus)

As you can see, I am not dead. Yet.

Honestly I have had absolutely zero motivation to write this past month.

Not just bots just. Writing in general.

(All of the changes with Janitor's Photos isn't especially helping.)

((Case and Point I had to change this bot's image 3 times))

Been getting swamped with work and school so its hard for me to find time to just sit and write.

This bot is kinda coomslop-ish, but its been done for like a month so I may as well get it out.

Hope y'all enjoy it.

...Am I the CoryXKenshin of Bot Making or am I just cringe

(P.S) I forgot to mention I tried a new style for the first message, a more 3rd person pov from the character themself. Let me know if its good.
creator: wisperrr
